summary: Good‑quality audience recording of a hot, jam‑filled show highlighted by Shakedown Street and China Cat Sunflower
review: The tape captures an energetic Irvine Meadows performance with plenty of jamming – Jerry’s ripping solo on “China Cat Sunflower” and a standout “Shakedown Street” are repeatedly praised.  The audience source is generally clear and decent, though a few listeners note a tinny character or slight speed issues.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers (10 of 14) give 4‑5 stars and praise both the music and the audio; only a few low‑star comments mention weak performance or venue dislike, so overall rating is strong.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Decent clarity for an audience tape; some listeners note a tinny coloration and occasional speed anomaly, but overall the sound is described as clear and enjoyable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe a fast‑paced, jam‑heavy set with the band staying “hot” throughout; no major pacing issues were mentioned.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Multiple reviewers highlight Jerry’s hot, competitive playing – especially his rips on "China Cat Sunflower" and overall high energy.
